events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the micron gauge image, read the two values, then write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The image shows 416 microns at pump isolation and 5006 microns after 10 minutes. That standing rise is far beyond an acceptable decay hold, so I’m recording this as a failed evacuation/decay test with likely leak or wet/contaminated circuit requiring rework.
